name: Orlando Golf Gym
about: Orlando Golf Gym is a premium 24/7 indoor golf training facility located in Longwood, Florida. It combines Foresight golf simulators with specialized fitness equipment and expert coaching to provide a comprehensive golf performance environment. The facility offers memberships that include unlimited access to training equipment and up to 4 hours daily of simulator time, with TrackMan technology for advanced swing analysis. The membership model targets serious golfers looking for year-round practice, data-driven improvement, and a fitness-focused approach to the game.
why_golfers_like_it: 24/7 access allows flexible training on any schedule
Premium Foresight simulators with TrackMan swing analysis technology
Golf-specific fitness equipment and conditioning programs
Private simulator rooms provide distraction-free practice environments
Professional coaching and performance assessment services available

food_and_drink.notes: No alcohol service mentioned, BYOB policy not specified

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium Foresight technology with TrackMan integration

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The facility doesn't explicitly state whether clubs are provided, so it's recommended to bring your own for the best practice experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No food or beverage service is mentioned, and there's no information about a BYOB policy. It's best to check with the facility directly if you plan to bring outside food or drinks.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: With 4 hours of daily simulator time included in membership, you can comfortably play multiple rounds. The exact time would depend on your pace and whether you're playing casual or competitive rounds.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No specific information about child-friendly features, junior programs, or age restrictions is provided. The facility appears to be geared toward serious adult golfers and fitness training.
